name: webrobot-browser-extensions
description: WebRobot Pipeline Designer browser extension (Chrome/Edge + Firefox, Manifest V3). Port of the VitePress demo app (DemoApp.vue): on-page selector picker + pipeline designer + run.

scripts.assemble:chrome: rm -rf dist/chrome && mkdir -p dist/chrome/src dist/chrome/sidepanel && cp -r src/content src/background dist/chrome/src/ && (cp -r icons dist/chrome/ 2>/dev/null || true) && cp -r ui-dist/* dist/chrome/sidepanel/ && cp manifest.chrome.json dist/chrome/manifest.json
scripts.assemble:firefox: rm -rf dist/firefox && mkdir -p dist/firefox/src dist/firefox/sidepanel && cp -r src/content src/background dist/firefox/src/ && (cp -r icons dist/firefox/ 2>/dev/null || true) && cp -r ui-dist/* dist/firefox/sidepanel/ && cp manifest.firefox.json dist/firefox/manifest.json
scripts.build:chrome: npm run build:ui && npm run assemble:chrome
scripts.build:firefox: npm run build:ui && npm run assemble:firefox
scripts.build: npm run build:ui && npm run assemble:chrome && npm run assemble:firefox
